# GitHub repository metadata

Use these values in the GitHub repo settings or via `gh repo edit`.

## Description (short)

```
RTL-SDR + MCP server: spectrum, waterfall, FM audio, station DB, GNU Radio demod — web dashboard & AI control via FastMCP 3.4
```

## Topics

```
sdr
software-defined-radio
rtl-sdr
mcp
mcp-server
model-context-protocol
fastmcp
python
gnuradio
spectrum-analyzer
waterfall
radio
websocket
hackrf
docker
react
```

## Website

```
http://127.0.0.1:10890
```

(Set to your deployed URL if you host the dashboard publicly.)

## Apply via CLI

```powershell
gh repo edit sandraschi/sdr-mcp --description "RTL-SDR + MCP server: spectrum, waterfall, FM audio, station DB, GNU Radio demod — web dashboard & AI control via FastMCP 3.4"
gh repo edit sandraschi/sdr-mcp --add-topic sdr --add-topic software-defined-radio --add-topic rtl-sdr --add-topic mcp-server --add-topic model-context-protocol --add-topic gnuradio --add-topic spectrum-analyzer --add-topic waterfall --add-topic websocket --add-topic react --add-topic docker --add-topic hackrf
```
